warheads.name: 20 kt Fission device
warheads.description: Boosted fission warhead based on 1998 Shakti tests. Estimated 12-45 kt. For Prithvi and Agni-I.

warheads.name: 150 kt Thermonuclear warhead
warheads.description: Estimated thermonuclear warhead for Agni-IV/V. 1998 Shakti-1 thermonuclear test disputed (45 kt observed vs 45+ kt claimed).

warheads.name: Agni-V MIRV warhead
warheads.description: MIRV warhead tested 2024 on Agni-V. 3 warheads demonstrated. India's first MIRV capability.

warheads.name: K-15 Sagarika warhead
warheads.description: Compact warhead for submarine-launched K-15. Short-range SLBM limited to regional targeting.

delivery_systems.name: Agni-V
delivery_systems.description: India's first ICBM-class ballistic missile. Reaches all of China. MIRV tested 2024. Canisterized TEL.

delivery_systems.name: Agni-IV
delivery_systems.description: IRBM reaching all of Pakistan and most of China. Two-stage solid-fueled. Rail-mobile deployment.

delivery_systems.name: Agni-III
delivery_systems.description: Medium-range IRBM for targets in China. 3,000 kg payload. Rail or road mobile.

delivery_systems.name: Agni-II
delivery_systems.description: Pakistan-focused MRBM. Solid-fueled, road-mobile. Primary Pakistan theater deterrent.

delivery_systems.name: K-15 Sagarika (B-05)
delivery_systems.description: Short-range SLBM for INS Arihant (S-2) and Arighat (S-3). 4 tubes × 4 missiles. Very limited range.

delivery_systems.name: K-4 SLBM
delivery_systems.description: Longer-range SLBM for S-4/S-5 class SSBNs. 4 tubes in Arihant successor. Reaches most of China.

delivery_systems.name: Rafale F3-R (India)
delivery_systems.description: 36 Rafale jets acquired with SCALP cruise missile capability. Nuclear role possible with indigenous warhead integration.
